projectDescription: A curated collection of reusable skills for Claude Code and Kiro agents, covering bash scripting, git commits, markdown conversion, project memory, Terraform, and skill authoring.
keyFeatures: Drop-in skills for Claude Code and Kiro agents via symlink installation
Bash best practices: main function pattern, argument parsing, error handling, and logging
Conventional Commits enforcement for consistent git history
Structured project memory system for tracking decisions, bugs, and key facts
Terraform and OpenTofu opinionated guidance for modules, testing, and CI/CD
Skill Creator meta-skill for drafting, evaluating, and iterating on new skills
